verses.text: Keep the passover, the bread of affliction, in remembrance. Passover. Redemption is recalled.
Keep the passover, the bread of affliction, in remembrance. Passover. Redemption is recalled.
Keep the passover, the bread of affliction, in remembrance. Passover. Redemption is recalled.
Keep the passover, the bread of affliction, in remembrance. Passover. Redemption is recalled.
It must be kept at His chosen place. One place. Worship is ordered.
It must be kept at His chosen place. One place. Worship is ordered.
It must be kept at His chosen place. One place. Worship is ordered.
It must be kept at His chosen place. One place. Worship is ordered.
Keep the feast of weeks with a freewill offering, rejoicing. Weeks. Harvest brings thanksgiving.
Keep the feast of weeks with a freewill offering, rejoicing. Weeks. Harvest brings thanksgiving.
Keep the feast of weeks with a freewill offering, rejoicing. Weeks. Harvest brings thanksgiving.
Keep the feast of weeks with a freewill offering, rejoicing. Weeks. Harvest brings thanksgiving.
Keep the feast of tabernacles seven days, rejoicing. Tabernacles. Joy fills the feast.
Keep the feast of tabernacles seven days, rejoicing. Tabernacles. Joy fills the feast.
Keep the feast of tabernacles seven days, rejoicing. Tabernacles. Joy fills the feast.
Thrice a year all males appear before the LORD, none empty. Appear. Worship is regular and giving.
Thrice a year all males appear before the LORD, none empty. Appear. Worship is regular and giving.
Appoint just judges; 'that which is altogether just shalt thou follow.' Justice. Fairness honours God.
Appoint just judges; 'that which is altogether just shalt thou follow.' Justice. Fairness honours God.
Appoint just judges; 'that which is altogether just shalt thou follow.' Justice. Fairness honours God.
Plant no grove, set up no image by the altar. No idols. Worship stays pure.
Plant no grove, set up no image by the altar. No idols. Worship stays pure.
